textByHash.03fac0498ef3baa7dbfa99e734ba7b77456a6d8f: Well, my dad has gone that way, he's a knight!
textByHash.2921bb6892b8c438d6293063b4644580f60e7d05: To the west, to explore the Kebos Lowlands.
textByHash.85e9182d465ff6c43ac77c777c225678c0535823: It's the colour of my little duck friend.
textByHash.e524792fc148c9381d2d6f210f2efe9620a13405: Nope, that's Red, we're on an adventure!
